## Week in Review: 2026-03-16 to 2026-03-22

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 34.9.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 4.6 (+77.8% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.07)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 3.1 (+46.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.31)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 3.0 (+50.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.38)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 34.9 (+467.4% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.10)
